summary_s1: Results-driven Healthcare Business Analyst with 10+ years of experience in business analysis, process improvement, and automation within payer and provider healthcare environments.
summary_s2: Strong expertise in gathering, analyzing, and documenting business and functional requirements including BRDs, FRDs, PDDs, and SDDs.
summary_s3: In-depth knowledge of healthcare workflows such as claims processing, member enrollment, billing, and provider data management.
summary_s4: Hands-on experience with HIPAA compliance, PHI data handling, and regulatory standards including SOX and PCI.
summary_s5: Proven ability to perform AS-IS and TO-BE analysis, gap analysis, and process re-engineering to improve operational efficiency.
skills_healthcare: Healthcare Domain: Claims Processing, Member Enrollment, Billing, EHR/EMR, HIPAA Compliance
skills_ba: BA Skills: BRD, FRD, PDD, SDD, User Stories, Gap Analysis, UAT, Data Mapping
skills_tools: Tools: MS Visio, Excel, SharePoint, JIRA (Agile), Confluence
project1_bullet1: Gather and analyze business requirements for healthcare-related automation and digital transformation initiatives.
project1_bullet2: Conduct stakeholder meetings and workshops to understand claims processing, billing, and operational workflows.
project1_bullet3: Create BRDs, FRDs, and Solution Design Documents (SDDs) for healthcare systems.
project1_bullet4: Perform AS-IS and TO-BE analysis to identify process improvement opportunities.
project2_bullet1: Worked on payer-side healthcare processes including claims adjudication and member services.
project2_bullet2: Collaborated with SMEs to document PDDs, BRDs, and process workflows.
project2_bullet3: Identified automation opportunities to improve efficiency and reduce manual errors.
project2_bullet4: Conducted gap analysis and feasibility studies for healthcare process improvements.
